text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Tokyo Daishoten, and Oi
Racecourse is showing far more excitement than
usual this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like all the attention on Smart Falcon is
bringing plenty of attention to dirt races as a
whole.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the same, Smart Falcon learns that the recent
Arima Kinen brought in more than three times as
many spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets herself get distracted by this gap in
popularity, so I tell her to stay focused on the
win.
